mapper.sql: select f.fee_id, f.scene_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.business_domain, s.default_object_dimension as scene_default_object_dimension, f.fee_code, f.fee_name, f.fee_category, f.unit_code, f.factor_summary, f.scope_description, f.object_dimension, f.sort_no, f.status, f.remark, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time from cost_fee_item f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id

where.if: and ( f.fee_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or f.fee_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: order by f.update_time desc, f.fee_id desc
order by s.scene_name asc, f.sort_no asc, f.fee_id asc

select count(1) as feeCount, coalesce(sum(case when f.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledFeeCount, count(distinct f.scene_id) as sceneCoverageCount from cost_fee_item f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id

select f.fee_id as feeId, f.scene_id as sceneId, s.scene_code as sceneCode, s.scene_name as sceneName, s.business_domain as businessDomain, s.default_object_dimension as sceneDefaultObjectDimension, f.fee_code as feeCode, f.fee_name as feeName, f.fee_category as feeCategory, f.unit_code as unitCode, f.factor_summary as factorSummary, f.scope_description as scopeDescription, f.object_dimension as objectDimension, f.sort_no as sortNo, f.status as status, f.remark as remark, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = f.fee_id) as ruleCount, (select count(1) from cost_fee_variable_rel rel where rel.fee_id = f.fee_id) as variableRelCount, (select count(1) from cost_publish_snapshot snap join cost_publish_version ver on ver.version_id = snap.version_id where ver.scene_id = f.scene_id and snap.snapshot_type = 'FEE' and snap.object_code = f.fee_code) as publishedVersionCount, (select count(1) from cost_result_ledger l where l.fee_id = f.fee_id) as resultLedgerCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0') as enabledRuleCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status != '0') as disabledRuleCount, (select count(1) from cost_fee_variable_rel rel join cost_variable v on v.variable_id = rel.variable_id where rel.fee_id = f.fee_id and v.status = '0') as enabledVariableRelCount, (select count(1) from cost_fee_variable_rel rel left join cost_variable v on v.variable_id = rel.variable_id where rel.fee_id = f.fee_id and (v.variable_id is null or v.status != '0')) as invalidVariableRelCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0' and r.rule_type = 'TIER_RATE' and not exists ( select 1 from cost_rule_tier t where t.rule_id = r.rule_id and t.status = '0' )) as tierRuleMissingTierCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r left join cost_variable v on v.scene_id = r.scene_id and v.variable_code = r.quantity_variable_code and v.status = '0' where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0' and r.quantity_variable_code is not null and r.quantity_variable_code != '' and v.variable_id is null) as missingQuantityVariableCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r join cost_rule_condition c on c.rule_id = r.rule_id left join cost_variable v on v.scene_id = r.scene_id and v.variable_code = c.variable_code and v.status = '0' where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0' and c.variable_code is not null and c.variable_code != '' and v.variable_id is null) as missingConditionVariableCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0' and r.rule_type = 'FORMULA' and (r.amount_formula_code is null or r.amount_formula_code = '')) as missingFormulaCodeCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r left join cost_formula fo on fo.scene_id = r.scene_id and fo.formula_code = r.amount_formula_code and fo.status = '0' where r.fee_id = f.fee_id and r.status = '0' and r.rule_type = 'FORMULA' and r.amount_formula_code is not null and r.amount_formula_code != '' and fo.formula_id is null) as missingFormulaAssetCount from cost_fee_item f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id where f.fee_id = #{feeId}

select rel.rel_id as relId, rel.scene_id as sceneId, rel.fee_id as feeId, rel.variable_id as variableId, v.variable_code as variableCode, v.variable_name as variableName, v.variable_type as variableType, v.source_type as variableSourceType, v.data_type as dataType, v.data_path as dataPath, v.status as variableStatus, rel.relation_type as relationType, rel.source_type as sourceType, rel.source_rule_id as sourceRuleId, rel.source_code as sourceCode, r.rule_code as sourceRuleCode, r.rule_name as sourceRuleName, rel.sort_no as sortNo, rel.remark as remark from cost_fee_variable_rel rel left join cost_variable v on v.variable_id = rel.variable_id left join cost_rule r on r.rule_id = rel.source_rule_id where rel.fee_id = #{feeId} order by rel.sort_no asc, rel.rel_id asc

select r.rule_id as ruleId, r.scene_id as sceneId, r.fee_id as feeId, r.rule_code as ruleCode, r.rule_name as ruleName, r.rule_type as ruleType, r.pricing_mode as pricingMode, r.priority as priority, r.quantity_variable_code as quantityVariableCode, r.amount_formula_code as amountFormulaCode, r.status as status, (select count(1) from cost_rule_condition c where c.rule_id = r.rule_id) as conditionCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule_tier t where t.rule_id = r.rule_id) as tierCount from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = #{feeId} order by r.priority asc, r.sort_no asc, r.rule_id asc limit 20

select ver.version_id as versionId, ver.scene_id as sceneId, ver.version_no as versionNo, ver.version_status as versionStatus, ver.publish_desc as publishDesc, ver.published_by as publishedBy, ver.published_time as publishedTime from cost_fee_item f join cost_publish_version ver on ver.scene_id = f.scene_id join cost_publish_snapshot snap on snap.version_id = ver.version_id and snap.snapshot_type = 'FEE' and snap.object_code = f.fee_code where f.fee_id = #{feeId} order by ver.published_time desc, ver.version_id desc limit 20

select l.result_id as resultId, l.task_id as taskId, l.version_id as versionId, ver.version_no as versionNo, l.task_no as taskNo, l.biz_no as bizNo, l.bill_month as billMonth, l.object_dimension as objectDimension, l.object_code as objectCode, l.object_name as objectName, l.quantity_value as quantityValue, l.unit_price as unitPrice, l.amount_value as amountValue, l.currency_code as currencyCode, l.result_status as resultStatus, l.create_time as createTime from cost_result_ledger l left join cost_publish_version ver on ver.version_id = l.version_id where l.fee_id = #{feeId} order by l.create_time desc, l.result_id desc limit 20
mapper.insert:
insert into cost_fee_variable_rel ( scene_id, fee_id, variable_id, relation_type, source_type, source_rule_id, source_code, sort_no, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values
( #{item.sceneId}, #{item.feeId}, #{item.variableId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.sourceRuleId}, #{item.sourceCode}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.remark}, 'system', sysdate(), 'system', sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from cost_fee_variable_rel where source_type = 'RULE_DERIVED' and fee_id in
#{feeId}
